title: Ukrainian-Style Baked Tomato
description: A delicious and flavorful Indian-inspired dish made with fresh tomatoes baked to perfection. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a weekend lunch.

ingredients.name: tomato
ingredients.notes: any variety of tomato works well

ingredients.name: ukrainian
ingredients.notes: or dried dill weed as a substitute

ingredients.name: delicious
ingredients.notes: or any other spice of your choice

instructions: Rinse the tomatoes and slice them into wedges.
In a small bowl, mix together the Ukrainian spice and delicious spice.
Place the tomato wedges in a baking dish and sprinkle the spice mixture evenly over them.
Sprinkle the baking powder over the top of the tomatoes.
Bake the tomatoes in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Serve the baked tomatoes hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
